data.title: todo: prep skogai/cloudflare repo for demos
data.description:
## What needs to exist before any demo can run

### Repo structure

```
skogai/cloudflare/
└── demos/
    ├── kv-hello/
    ├── d1-hello/
    ├── r2-hello/
    ├── do-websocket-hello/
    ├── queues-hello/
    ├── workers-ai-hello/
    ├── agents-hello/
    ├── workflows-hello/
    ├── vectorize-hello/
    └── analytics-engine-hello/
```

### Cloudflare account prep

- [ ] Get `CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID`
- [ ] Create a scoped API token (Workers + D1 + R2 + KV + AI + Vectorize + Queues + Analytics Engine)
- [ ] `wrangler login` locally

### Per demo — provision before binding

- [ ] KV namespace: `wrangler kv namespace create hello`
- [ ] D1 database: `wrangler d1 create hello`
- [ ] R2 bucket: `wrangler r2 bucket create hello`
- [ ] Queue: `wrangler queues create hello`
- [ ] Vectorize index: `wrangler vectorize create hello --dimensions=768 --metric=cosine`

### Tooling

- [ ] `node` or `bun` installed
- [ ] `wrangler` installed: `npm i -g wrangler`
- [ ] TypeScript: `npm i -g typescript`

### Notes

Durable Objects, Agents, Workflows and Analytics Engine need no pre-provisioning — they are declared in `wrangler.jsonc` and created on first deploy.
